/usr/bin/c++  -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 -std=c++11 -O2 -Wall -Wno-comment -Wno-return-type -Wno-switch -Wno-missing-noreturn -Wno-unused-function -Wno-ignored-attributes -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/clblast_tuner_transpose_pad.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/clblast_tuner_transpose_pad.dir/src/tuning/kernels/transpose_pad.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tuners_common_library.dir/src/utilities/compile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tuners_common_library.dir/src/utilities/clblast_exceptions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tuners_common_library.dir/src/utilities/timing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tuners_common_library.dir/src/utilities/utilities.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tuners_common_library.dir/src/tuning/configurations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tuners_common_library.dir/src/tuning/tuning.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tuners_common_library.dir/src/kernel_preprocessor.cpp.o -o clblast_tuner_transpose_pad  -Wl,-rpath,/home/me/development/pytorch_dlprim/build/dlprimitives/CLBlast/tart:/home/me/development/pytorch_dlprim/build/dlprimitives/CLBlast/tart/subprocess/subprocess: tart/libtart.so tart/subprocess/subprocess/libsubprocess.so -lstdc++fs -ldl /usr/lib/libvulkan.so
